text.message: he is in a much better position
I asked for a trade multiple times with you so red gets the trade
red is on 7 with a city and you are robbing from me?
Your gonna take road, we can all see
Do you all not realize green wins this game
thats cute but the last time you robbed me
so you dont think he wins either
i mean if we want to go to the beginning you plowed me first
but the truth is you are in the best position
